info.name: SWAT API
info.description: SWAT backend — full API surface: auth/RBAC, master data, scheduling, daily transactions, levies/refuel, maintenance & inspections, monitoring analytics, async reports, the TPA weighbridge integration, service accounts, and storage/archiving. Kept 1:1 with the Swagger spec at `/api/docs`. The web flow uses cookie session auth: run Auth → Login first. Native .NET clients use bearer tokens: run Auth → Get Token (native client), which captures accessToken + refreshToken for the Bearer requests; the weighbridge also accepts `X-API-Key`. Regenerate with `node apps/backend/postman/generate.mjs`.

item.name: System
item.description: Unauthenticated health checks. These sit at the server root, **not** under the `/api/v1` prefix, so they use `{{rootUrl}}` instead of `{{baseUrl}}`.

request.description: Liveness probe — returns { success:true, data:{ status:"ok" } }. Unguarded; not under api/v1.
Readiness probe — checks the database. 200 when ready, 503 when a dependency is down.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Run **Login** first to obtain the session cookie.

request.description: Sets the httpOnly swat.sid cookie. Captures mustChangePassword.
Clears mustChangePassword. Update adminPassword afterwards if you run this.
Issues a temporary password for {{userId}} and forces a change.

exec: pm.test('got tokens', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200)); const d = pm.response.json().data; pm.environment.set('accessToken', d.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', d.refreshToken);

request.description: OAuth2 password grant for the .NET clients. Captures accessToken + refreshToken into the environment. Forced-reset accounts get 403 (change password via web first).

exec: pm.test('rotated', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200)); const d = pm.response.json().data; pm.environment.set('accessToken', d.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', d.refreshToken);

request.description: Rotates the refresh token. Reusing an old/superseded token returns 401 (reuse-detection).
Same principal as the cookie session, authenticated by the bearer token.
Revokes the bearer session (token family).

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('userId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('roleId', value); }

request.description: Reconciles the permission table against the code catalog (permission:manage). Idempotent; never deletes rows or touches grants.

request.description: Impor Massal — upsert by legacyId; per-row validation. Frontend parses the CSV/Excel and posts structured rows.

request.description: Legacy insertJatahKitir — issue N kitir at once; returns all with printable KT-YYYYMM-NNNN codes for the kitir-printing app.

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Daily transaction workflow: a TransactionDay holds Hauls; each Haul has HaulAssignments (depart/return) that produce Trips. Set `transactionDayId`/`haulAssignmentId`/`tripId` from the list/detail responses below.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('transactionDayId', value); }

request.description: `date` (YYYY-MM-DD) is required. Captures the first day id.
Paginated day summaries (newest first) backing the Penjadwalan grid. Optional `status` ∈ IN_PROGRESS | DONE. Distinct from the date-keyed `GET /transaction-days` above.
Creates today's TransactionDay and seeds planned hauls/trips from the active schedule templates. Idempotent.
Detail includes the hauls + assignments — copy a haulAssignmentId/tripId for the requests below.
status ∈ IN_PROGRESS | DONE.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('tripId', value); }

request.description: Set haulAssignmentId from a transaction-day detail. Captures the first trip id.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('tripId', value); }

request.description: Legacy parity — record an unscheduled trip. Provide routeId, or category + destinationSiteId. Add actualTime+actualOdometer to record it (DONE) in one call.
Returns each photo with a short-lived presigned view URL.
Legacy dokumentasitrayek — upload bytes via /storage/presigned-put first, then register the object metadata here.
Checker verification — no body.
Reverts a recorded trip to IN_PROGRESS and clears the entered values, keeping the scheduled slot — the recap grid “Hapus” action. Category-specific permission; a verified trip needs trip:override.

request.description: type ∈ SERVICE | REPAIR.
Supervisor approval — no body.

request.description: items[].status ∈ OK | ATTENTION | FAIL.

item.name: Monitoring
item.description: Read-only analytics over the pre-aggregated rollup tables. All endpoints take `dateFrom`/`dateTo` (YYYY-MM-DD, **required**). The demo seed covers 2025-06-09 … 2026-06-08.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Async Excel/PDF report engine. **Generate** enqueues a BullMQ job and returns a `jobId` (captured). Poll **Get Job** until status is `READY`, then **Download** for a presigned URL. `format` ∈ xlsx | pdf.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('reportJobId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('reportJobId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('reportJobId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('reportJobId', value); }

request.description: Poll until data.status === "READY" (or "FAILED").
Returns a presigned MinIO URL once the job is READY.

item.name: Weighbridge (TPA Integration)
item.description: TPA "Jembatan Timbang" REST API (replaces the legacy SOAP). Dual auth: the admin **session cookie** works for the operator endpoints, OR send `X-API-Key: {{weighbridgeApiKey}}` (the demo seed prints a `swatwb_demo_…` key) for unattended posting. `post-weighing` accepts an optional `Idempotency-Key`.

request.description: Look up the open disposal-permit (kitir) for a plate/date before posting a weighing.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('weighbridgeTripId', value); }

request.description: Creates/updates the inbound weighing + Trip. operatorId (legacy petugasid) attributes the human weigher on API-key posts. Captures the resulting tripId.
Bulk import a legacy weighbridge Excel export. Attach an .xlsx in the file field before sending.

item.name: Service Accounts (Admin)
item.description: Manage machine principals + their API keys (for the weighbridge/native integrations) and inspect the API audit trail. Requires `service-account:manage`.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('serviceAccountId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('serviceAccountId', String(value)); }

request.description: Response includes the one-time plaintext API key — copy it into weighbridgeApiKey.
Returns a presigned MinIO PUT URL the client uploads to directly.
Lists detached/archived monthly partitions.
Re-attaches a previously detached monthly partition for querying.
